scope: First Jedi-tree cleanup pass focused on core Jedi, Jedi Sentinel/Guardian/Consular, Lightsaber Combat, Lightsaber Forms, and Duelist seams that had proven or obvious live-runtime bad metadata.
principles: Descriptions in packs/talents.db are treated as canonical book text.
Ability Engine/passive state/modifier/derived calculators remain the implementation authority.
No tree-specific JS files were created.
Missing staticSheetPolicy was not treated as a bug.
Conditionals requiring unknown target, ally, positioning, dark-side-source, or reaction state were punted to GM/player or future runtime resolver metadata.

implementedOrCorrected.name: Force Intuition
implementedOrCorrected.actionTaken: Removed bogus defense modifier/effect and implemented Initiative trained + Use the Force substitution in DerivedCalculator.
implementedOrCorrected.note: Also marks derived Initiative with forceIntuitionSubstitution metadata when Use the Force is used.

implementedOrCorrected.name: Niman
implementedOrCorrected.actionTaken: Converted to equipped-lightsaber defense context: +1 Reflex and +1 Will only while a lightsaber is equipped/readied.
implementedOrCorrected.note: Uses new weapon.lightsaber-equipped predicate; not an unconditional static bonus.

implementedOrCorrected.name: Weapon Specialization (Lightsabers)
implementedOrCorrected.actionTaken: Deduped to one canonical Jedi/lightsaber-only talent and converted to +2 damage only on lightsaber melee damage rolls.
implementedOrCorrected.note: Soldier generic Weapon Specialization remains separate for a future persistent weapon-group picker.

implementedOrCorrected.name: Greater Weapon Specialization (Lightsabers)
implementedOrCorrected.actionTaken: Converted to additional +2 damage only on lightsaber melee damage rolls; stacks with Weapon Specialization.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Resist the Dark Side
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Applies only against dark-side Force powers or dark Force-users; system does not currently know that descriptor/source in static prep.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Gradual Resistance
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Requires confirming repeated uses or force-specific condition; no always-on defense.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Visionary Defense
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Conditional context, not permanent Reflex.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Lightsaber Defense
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Swift-action deflection bonus until next turn; requires activation and flat-footed awareness state.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Makashi
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.actionTaken: Removed permanent Reflex modifier and legacy active-effect generation.
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Only improves active Lightsaber Defense while wielding a single one-handed lightsaber.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Shii-Cho
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.actionTaken: Removed bogus melee attack/damage Active Effect.
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Canon effect reduces cumulative Block/Deflect penalty; it is not +1 attack/damage.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Djem So
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.actionTaken: Removed bogus attack/damage style metadata and legacy active-effect generation.
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Reaction counterattack after being hit by melee and spending a Force Point.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Juyo
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.actionTaken: Removed bogus skill/attack style metadata and legacy active-effect generation.
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Needs once-per-encounter target designation and attack reroll state.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Block
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Reaction Use the Force check; no passive attack bonus.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Redirect Shot
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Only after successful Deflect; needs prompt/target context.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Precise Redirect
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Only modifies redirected shots after Deflect.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Battle Meditation
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Requires activation/ally context; no passive actor attack bonus.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Dark Side Bane
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Conditional dark-side/Force context; no always-on force damage.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Dark Side Scourge
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Requires target dark-side identity/creature context; punted.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Force Haze
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Activated/concealment-style effect; no passive Reflex bonus.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Resilience
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Full-round action to move up condition track; no passive Fortitude.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Steel Resolve
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Description is not a passive Fortitude bonus.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Vigilance
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Ally/positioning context; no permanent self defense.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Defensive Circle
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Requires circle/ally conditions not known by sheet prep.

removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.name: Jedi Quarry
removedBogusStaticOrLiveBonuses.note: Requires designated quarry/movement context; no permanent speed.

soldierGenericKept.recommendedFutureWork: Persistent weapon-group/category picker for Soldier generic Weapon Specialization.

newRuntimeSupport.change: Added weapon.lightsaber-equipped and weapon.lightsaber predicates for equipment-context defense and roll-context damage.
PASSIVE/STATE damage bonuses now honor ModifierEngine context guards and predicate requirements before adding to damage rolls.
Force Intuition now trains Initiative and substitutes Use the Force total for Initiative when higher.
Removed legacy active-effect generation for several Jedi/lightsaber forms that were not passive numeric bonuses.

reviewOrPuntBucket.reason: Current pack description is blank; existing deflect metadata should be reviewed against canon before removal or automation.
Canon reroll for failed Block/Deflect Use the Force checks needs Block/Deflect resolver state; current disabled metadata is harmless.
Take 10/Tumble movement-square behavior requires skill-use/movement resolver, not static speed.
Two-swift Feint option requires combat action UI/skill-use prompt.
Natural 19/20 critical threat with caveat needs attack roll critical-threshold support for lightsabers.
Appears to have a plausible skill substitution effect; left untouched until skill-substitution audit.
Existing system.attacks.lightsaber effect may be current attack owner; left untouched until attack-path validation.
Requires dual-wield/shoto equipped context; left untouched until weapon equipment-context audit.

recommendedNextPatchOrder: Block/Deflect action-state resolver and reaction prompts
Lightsaber Defense active toggle/temporary defense effect
Makashi/Shii-Cho/Soresu form interactions with Block/Deflect/Lightsaber Defense
Vaapad critical-threat support for lightsaber attack rolls
Soldier generic Weapon Specialization persistent picker
Force-context resolver for dark-side source/descriptor detection
Ally/area aura context for Battle Meditation/Defensive Circle/Vigilance
Skill substitution audit for Force Persuasion and similar Jedi talents
